assertions.assertion: Sets EncryptAssertions = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Populates EncryptionCertificates with a certificate loaded from certs/sp-encryption.cer
assertions.rationale: No encryption certificate is loaded or configured.

assertions.assertion: Sets AllowIdpInitiated = true on the SamlServiceProvider
assertions.rationale: AllowIdpInitiated is not set on the SamlServiceProvider.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the IdP-initiated SSO endpoint must be enabled via options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true
assertions.rationale: The specific endpoint setting is not mentioned.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT set EncryptAssertions = true without providing EncryptionCertificates
assertions.rationale: EncryptAssertions = true is set but EncryptionCertificates is not populated.
